station_imaging_policy: Station-owned Mole FM IDs are interlaced before the station news intro and after the French news item before returning to live radio or approved fallback programming.
voice_policy: Voice generation uses zero-cost edge-tts neural voices by default. Paid ElevenLabs may be selected explicitly with quota guardrails. macOS/system voices are preview-only and are refused for public broadcast packs unless an operator explicitly requests local_preview.

voice_quality_summary.next_upgrade: Keep monitoring neural voice availability, cache hits, and listener feedback before expanding generation volume.

audio_delivery_policy: Mole FM serves smoothed low-bandwidth MP3 streams with station-owned Mole FM IDs stitched around the news voice, while keeping the premium voice master available as the archive copy.
deployed_audio_policy: Timestamped generation runs stay local/operator proof; MoleFM.com serves the latest approved natural-voice pack through this stable deployable alias.
